sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ الطَّعَامُ التَّقْلِيدِيُّ مَصْدَرَ فَخْرٍ لِلشُّعُوبِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Tradicionalna hrana je izvor ponosa za arapske narode.
sentences.translationEn: Traditional food is a source of pride for Arab peoples.

sentences.arabic: يَتَمَيَّزُ الْمَنْسَفُ فِي الْأُرْدُنِ بِطَعْمِهِ اللَّذِيذِ وَمُكَوِّنَاتِهِ الْغَنِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Mansaf u Jordanu odlikuje se ukusnim okusom i bogatim sastojcima.
sentences.translationEn: Mansaf in Jordan is characterized by its delicious taste and rich ingredients.

sentences.arabic: يَتَكَوَّنُ هَذَا الطَّبَقُ مِنَ اللَّحْمِ وَالْأُرْزِ وَلَبَنِ الْجَمِيدِ.
sentences.translation: Ovo jelo se sastoji od mesa, riže i jamid jogurta.
sentences.translationEn: This dish consists of meat, rice, and jameed (dried yogurt).

sentences.arabic: يَجْتَمِعُ النَّاسُ حَوْلَ مَائِدَةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ لِتَنَاوُلِ الْوَجْبَةِ مَعًا.
sentences.translation: Ljudi se okupljaju oko jedne trpeze kako bi zajedno jeli obrok.
sentences.translationEn: People gather around one table to eat the meal together.

sentences.arabic: تَعْكِسُ هَذِهِ الْعَادَةُ رُوحَ الْمُشَارَكَةِ وَالْمَحَبَّةِ بَيْنَ الْأَصْدِقَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj običaj odražava duh dijeljenja i ljubavi među prijateljima.
sentences.translationEn: This custom reflects the spirit of sharing and love among friends.
